response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyric reference. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were used to structure the text exactly matching the vocals. Instrumental sections at the start and end were excluded from subtitling. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps synchronized with the song's key vocal bursts.

subtitles.original: 雲を割って洩れ注ぐ light ray
subtitles.english: Light rays breaking through the clouds

subtitles.original: 濡れた駅は眩しさに包まれる
subtitles.english: The wet station is wrapped in brilliance

subtitles.original: 旅立ちのホーム振り向く笑顔
subtitles.english: A smiling face turning back on the platform of departure

subtitles.original: 前途洋々！明るく君はそう言って
subtitles.english: Future prospects! You said so brightly

subtitles.original: 見送る僕にピースを振った step into the dream
subtitles.english: You waved a peace sign at me seeing you off, step into the dream

subtitles.original: 僕もここで頑張るよ promise
subtitles.english: I will do my best here too, promise

subtitles.original: 指を切った感触が切ないよ
subtitles.english: The feeling of our pinky promise is so sad

subtitles.original: 動き出す瞳視線で追った
subtitles.english: I followed your moving eyes with my gaze

subtitles.original: 何て言ったの？電車が声を連れ去って
subtitles.english: What did you say? The train carried your voice away

subtitles.original: 一瞬君の光った頬が step into the dream
subtitles.english: For a moment, your shining cheek, step into the dream

subtitles.original: 旅立ちの二人微かな恋に
subtitles.english: For the two of us departing, in our faint love

subtitles.original: 前途洋々！心で強く言い聞かせ
subtitles.english: Future prospects! Telling myself strongly in my heart

subtitles.original: 踏み出す君に負けずに僕も
subtitles.english: Not to lose to you taking your step, I will also

subtitles.original: step into the dream step into the dream
subtitles.english: step into the dream step into the dream
